# Cursor Agent Rules for PakSentiment

## Architecture Principles
- Follow clean architecture.
- Keep Nest.js as main backend.
- Use FastAPI for data ingestion sources.
- All AI-related processing lives in Python.
- Frontend must use SCSS modules and modular components.

## General Rules
- No hardcoded API keys.
- Use environment variables.
- Always write clean TypeScript.
- Keep each module small and cohesive.
